purpose: Structural manifest of every registered MCP tool, built by runtime-introspecting buildServer(ctx). Source of truth for tool-set discovery in gate scripts.

tools.name: clockify_expenses_categories_archive
tools.title: Archive or reactivate an expense category

tools.name: clockify_groups_add_member
tools.title: Add a user to a group

tools.name: clockify_groups_list_members
tools.title: List members of a user group

tools.name: clockify_groups_remove_member
tools.title: Remove a user from a group

tools.name: clockify_holidays_list_in_period
tools.title: List holidays in a period for a user

tools.name: clockify_project_custom_fields_remove
tools.title: Remove a custom field from a project

tools.name: clockify_time_off_policies_archive
tools.title: Archive or reactivate a time-off policy

tools.name: clockify_users_invite
tools.title: Invite a user to the workspace
